name: ai-code-exposure-monitor
description: Live % of your code seen by AI assistants. Detects secrets, passwords, PII exposed to AI tools (Copilot, Claude, Cursor, etc.). 100% local. Works in VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, VSCodium. MCP + team-work exposure features ready — just ask.

commands.title: AI Code Exposure: Reset Current Project
AI Code Exposure: Reset All Peaks
AI Code Exposure: Forget a Project…
AI Code Exposure: Mark Current File as Test Data
AI Code Exposure: Remove Test-Data Flag from Current File
AI Code Exposure: Clear All Test-Data Flags
AI Code Exposure: Toggle Proactive Protection (PSDE)
AI Code Exposure: Review Sensitive Files (PSDE)

aiExposure.includeGlobs.description: Glob patterns for files counted as source code.

aiExposure.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns to exclude from counting.

aiExposure.persistAcrossSessions.description: Remember which files were opened across VS Code restarts (per project).

aiExposure.maxFileSizeKB.description: Skip files larger than this when counting lines.

aiExposure.thresholdAd.enabled.description: Show a one-time notification when this project's exposure first crosses 50%.

aiExposure.thresholdAd.percent.description: Percentage threshold that triggers the notification.

aiExposure.thresholdAd.url.description: URL opened from the high-exposure notification's CTA button.

aiExposure.sensitiveAlert.enabled.description: Show a live warning when a file containing secrets, credentials, or PII is opened (and therefore potentially exposed to AI tools).

aiExposure.sensitiveAlert.modal.description: Show the sensitive-data alert as a modal popup (blocks UI until dismissed). Disable for a less intrusive corner notification.

aiExposure.proactiveProtection.enabled.description: Proactive Sensitive Data Exposure (PSDE): block AI from seeing sensitive files until you explicitly confirm. Opens a modal every time a protected file is about to be exposed.

aiExposure.proactiveProtection.reviewAft.description: When PSDE is on and a workspace scan finds sensitive files, immediately open a review picker so you can bulk-mark test fixtures.

aiExposure.highlightSensitive.enabled.description: Highlight the exact secrets, credentials, and PII inside open editors with a colored marker and gutter icon.
